root_cause: LLM used <motion.div> without importing motion from framer-motion.
system_prompt_fix: Always import required libraries before using components. If motion.div is used, import { motion } from 'framer-motion'.

root_cause: Invalid JSX structure with stray '>' and unexpected const declarations inside JSX.
system_prompt_fix: Ensure JSX syntax correctness: variables must be declared outside JSX and no invalid characters inside JSX tags.

root_cause: inputRange and outputRange arrays had different lengths in interpolate().
system_prompt_fix: Ensure inputRange and outputRange arrays in interpolate() always have identical lengths.

root_cause: Invalid '$' character caused JS syntax failure.
system_prompt_fix: Do not output template variables or '$' characters unless inside valid JavaScript template strings.

root_cause: inputRange and outputRange mismatch in interpolate().
system_prompt_fix: Always validate interpolate() arrays so both ranges contain equal number of values.

root_cause: Mismatch between inputRange and outputRange values.
system_prompt_fix: When animating color transitions, ensure inputRange and outputRange arrays are equal length.

root_cause: Center alignment rule missing and interpolate() contained non-numeric values.
system_prompt_fix: All centered shapes must use explicit center alignment logic and interpolate ranges must contain only numeric frame values.

root_cause: Code attempted to reassign a variable declared with const.
system_prompt_fix: Never reassign const variables; use let when values need modification.

root_cause: ${durationInFrames} was written as plain text instead of JSX expression.
system_prompt_fix: All dynamic values inside JSX props must be wrapped with {}.

root_cause: LLM produced invalid if/else block syntax.
system_prompt_fix: Ensure conditional blocks follow correct JavaScript syntax and are placed outside JSX where required.

root_cause: inputRange contained duplicate values [30,30], violating increasing rule.
system_prompt_fix: All inputRange values must be strictly increasing numbers.

root_cause: LLM used loop/map instead of explicit JSX elements for grid generation.
system_prompt_fix: Do not use loops or array mapping; explicitly declare each element in JSX.

root_cause: scale variable referenced without declaration.
system_prompt_fix: Every variable used in transforms must be explicitly declared before usage.

root_cause: AI used programmatic looping to generate grid elements.
system_prompt_fix: Grid elements must be explicitly written without loops or programmatic generation.

root_cause: AI attempted to generate starburst lines using loop logic.
system_prompt_fix: All shapes must be declared explicitly in JSX without loops.

root_cause: Mismatched braces caused build failure.
system_prompt_fix: Ensure balanced braces and parentheses in JSX and TypeScript code.

root_cause: inputRange defined backwards [135,90].
system_prompt_fix: All interpolate inputRange values must increase chronologically (e.g., [90,135]).

prompt: Text Badge Animation. Light background. A rounded rectangle badge (300px x 120px, blue #1E88E5, corner radius 24px) placed at the center. Inside the badge a white text label 'HELLO' (bold sans-serif, 60px) is centered horizontally and vertically. Animation (8s): 0-1s: The rounded rectangle fades in at center. 1-2s: The text fades in slightly after the rectangle. 2-4s: The entire badge (rectangle and text together) scales up from 100% -> 115%. 4-5.5s: The badge rotates slightly (-8° -> 8°) like a gentle wobble while the text remains centered inside the box. 5.5-7s: The badge returns to normal rotation and scales back to original size. 7-8s: Both text and rectangle fade out together. Total duration: 8s.

prompt: Radial Gradient Typewriter Title. Smooth radial gradient background from deep purple #7B1FA2 at the edges to vivid blue #2196F3 toward the center with a soft central radial brightness glow color #FFFFFF. Canvas 1920x1080. A single large text object '10 years ago' (120px Arial Bold, color #FFFFFF) centered on canvas with optical tracking adjusted for legibility; a thin caret (4px x 120px, color #FFFFFF) sits at the text end during typing. Animation (6s): 0-0.6s: Background gradient and central radial glow fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out while the text and caret remain invisible. 0.6-4.8s: Typewriter reveal of '10 years ago' at center: reveal each character sequentially over the entire phase with an exact interval of 0.35s per character (12 characters total), each character animating from opacity 0 to 1 and translating upward 8px with ease-out; the caret moves to follow the next character position instantly with ease-in-out between character placements and blinks continuously during this phase with a 0.5s blink cycle (0.25s visible, 0.25s hidden) using linear easing. 4.8-6.0s: Hold final state with full text visible at center, caret continues a final blink for the hold duration, and background glow remains steady. Total duration: 6s.
